title: Gold vs Bitcoin: collapse insurance?
question: When equities collapse, does gold protect — and is Bitcoin "digital gold" or a risk asset?
finding: Bitcoin is a risk asset, not digital gold. Across 8 SPY selloffs (≥8%) BTC fell 8/8 and worse than SPY in 7/8 (median −29%) while gold beat SPY in 7/8 (−3%); BTC's crash beta is ~0.94 (1.68 in the tail) and its 90-day SPY correlation roughly quadrupled (0.08→0.37) — converging toward equities, away from gold.
